demo_timestamps.description: Demonstration of using a skill with an MCP to write GraphQL queries with Autodesk's AC data model
Demo of a bundle combining a Skill with an MCP including tools to introspect, search, and validate GraphQL schema.

themes: Using GraphQL and AI for Scalable Data Access
Improving Collaboration and Coordination in AEC
Scalable AI for BIM using GraphQL and MCP

client_mentions.name: AECOM
client_mentions.context: Introduction by Mirko Bianchi, representing the company

ai_technologies.name: Claude
ai_technologies.context: Used to create and utilize skills for querying AEC data model via GraphQL

ai_technologies.name: Apollo GraphQL
ai_technologies.context: Utilized as an MCP server for running loops to build and validate GraphQL queries.

ai_technologies.name: large language model
ai_technologies.context: Discussed with reference to the context window problem and hallucinations.

summary: The video explores the integration of scalable AI in Building Information Modeling (BIM) using GraphQL and the MCP approach, addressing challenges in data accessibility and enhancing collaboration through AI, particularly with large language models like Claude. It demonstrates a bundle implementation to guide AI in effectively using Autodesk's AC data model and presents a scalable approach by combining Skills with MCPs using Apollo GraphQL to improve query efficiency and minimize issues such as hallucinations. It emphasizes the importance of tailoring AI technology use cases for specific scenarios to optimize agentic workflows.
